channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish all over road, 22nd July
item.description:
Rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penrose Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty street, 22nd July
item.description:
This part of mare street from lamb lane is very dirty and the street is stained with what looks like oil spillages, please get this section power washed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sprayed TP, 22nd July
item.description:
Tp need cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King's Grove, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Litter, 22nd July
item.description:
Litter throughout street, crushed cans / bottles. Crisp packets extra.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenways, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request for Inspection and Pruning of Street Tree Outside 2b woodberry down N4, 22nd July
item.description:
Dear Street Trees Team, I am writing to request to inspect the street tree located outside my business premises at: Buns on Fire 2B Woodberry Down London N4 The tree has grown significantly, and its branches now obstruct the visibility of

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reclining sofa metal frames fly tipped, 22nd July
item.description:
What looks like 2 sets of reclining sofa frames have been dumped at the corner entrance of Alwold Crescent, by Westhorne Avenue. Postcode SE12 9AF

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westhorne Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lounge furniture dumped, 22nd July
item.description:
These items of furniture have been here at least two weeks and have been reported before on FixMyStreet. Come on Southwark council. They are inside the gate to One Tree Hill nature reserve on the Brenchley Gardens side (southern gate).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brenchley Gardens, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and furniture dumped, 22nd July
item.description:
Loads of rubbish and furniture has been fly tipped in the car parking area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Temple Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Penrose street litter, 22nd July
item.description:
Litter all over the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penrose Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Lime bikes, 22nd July
item.description:
Se77ta Adjacent to Derrick Gardens 2 bikes. Many more along Anchor & Hope lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Anchor And Hope Lane, Charlton Riverside, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New litter all over grass outside bungalow, 22nd July
item.description:
Thank you for litter pick. Unfortunately there is now more litter all over grass outside bungalow and people are too lazy and selfish to pick it up!!! I’m doing my best to keep this area litter free but have bad back, I’m 74

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3-17, Cherry Orchard Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crewdson Road needs a sweep and tidy, 22nd July
item.description:
Rubbish in the gutters

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Crewdson Road, Oval, Greater London

item.title: 285 Kilburn High Road. NW6 7JR, 22nd July
item.description:

item.title: Sprayed TP, 22nd July
item.description:
Tp sprayed need cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King's Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gutter is full of large stones and clay lumps, 22nd July
item.description:
Since the burst water main at Bromley Common the gutter just before the junction of Victoria Rd and Mosslea Rd has been full of large stones and clay debris washed down by water from the burst main. My wife and I have bagged up a fair amount but we are struggling to clear the rest properly. We also have a large bag of stones etc which we would like collected.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering all along the alley way. broken glass etc, 22nd July
item.description:
Littering all along the alley way. broken glass etc, clothes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes getting larger plus overgrown bushes, 22nd July
item.description:
There are several potholes along acces road to carpark and overgrosn brambles etc scratching car paintwork.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Hall Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds all overgrown along Percy Road, 22nd July
item.description:
Weeds all overgrown along Percy Road and around the various trees. Litter has accumlatted around the trees and pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Percy Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More abandoned wheelie bins at Mottingham station, 22nd July
item.description:
Abandoned wheelie bins near ticket office at Mottingham station.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Station Approach Southside, Mottingham
